zh.Pishill, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾皮希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard d’Oyley於大約1251年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，他的父親Roger d'Oyly Jr36歲，母親Agnes Napparius29歲。他於1283年與Christina of Pushull在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1322年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾皮希爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.Pishill, Oxfordshire, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾皮希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard d’Oyley于大约1251年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，他的父亲Roger d'Oyly Jr36岁，母亲Agnes Napparius29岁。他于1283年与Christina of Pushull在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1322年在英国英格兰奧可福爾皮希爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: d’Oyley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: variant of Olley with preposition d’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard d’Oyley was born about 1251, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger d'Oyly Jr, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Napparius, was 29. He married Christina of Pushull in 1283, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1322, in Pishill, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard d’Oyley est né environ 1251, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger d'Oyly Jr, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Napparius, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Christina of Pushull en 1283, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1322, à Pishill, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard d’Oyley um 1251 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger d'Oyly Jr 36 und seine Mutter Agnes Napparius 29. Er hat 1283 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Christina of Pushull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1322 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Pishill, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard d’Oyley è nato il circa 1251 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger d'Oyly Jr, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Napparius, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Christina of Pushull nel 1283, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1322, nel Pishill, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard d’Oyleyが約1251年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger d'Oyly Jrは36歳，母Agnes Nappariusは29歳であった。1283年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでChristina of Pushullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1322年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアピシュイルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard d’Oyley(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger d'Oyly Jr(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Napparius(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Christina of Pushull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 피시에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard d’Oyley nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger d'Oyly Jr, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Napparius, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina of Pushull em 1283, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1322, em Pishill, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard d’Oyley родился около 1251 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger d'Oyly Jr было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Napparius, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina of Pushull в 1283 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1322 г. в местности пишилл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard d’Oyley nació aproximadamente 1251, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger d'Oyly Jr, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes Napparius, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Christina of Pushull en 1283, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1322, en Pishill, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
